svg.title: Threaded Strut — Side View, End View, Thread Detail
svg.text: Material: PETG | Print: Vertical | Dims in mm | Thread: Tr12×3 P1.5 (2-start trapezoidal)

g.text: Strut body (PETG) — section through thread axis, upper half shown
2. Print orientation: vertical (thread axis = Z on print bed)
7. Plate end: press-fit + epoxy into 12mm ID socket (permanent)
8. Knob end: threads into wing knob female Tr12×3 thread
9. Passes through rear wall via 12.5mm bore (0.25mm clearance/side)
Pitch per start: 1.5mm | Lead: 3.0mm | Flank angle: 29° included
